title: Head Name Fix
description: Mob heads will keep their custom names when placed
body:
This is a server-side mod that will save the names of renamed mob/player heads that are placed down, just like chests or banners do in vanilla (Fixes [MC-174496](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-174496) for pre-1.20.5 versions, and fixes [MC-270918](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-270918) for 1.20.5-1.21.8).  

Partially fixed (for player heads only) in vanilla 1.20.5  
Fully fixed for all other mob heads in vanilla 1.21.9.  
This mod will no longer recieve updates for newer versions
